scenarios.description: search(nonexistent) returns empty list when index contains no entry for term (branch-false at B0)
search(term) returns single result for one document (branch-true at B0, one loop iteration)
scenarios.path: B0竊達2竊達7竊達3竊達5竊達7竊達6
scenarios.precondition: BM25InvertedIndex with one movie containing term 'hero'
scenarios.expectedResult: return List with one SearchResult(docId=1, relevanceScore > 0)

scenarios.description: search(term) orders multiple documents by descending score (branch-true at B0, multiple loop iterations)
scenarios.path: B0竊達2竊達7竊達3竊達5竊達7竊達3竊達5竊達7竊達6
scenarios.precondition: BM25InvertedIndex with two movies containing term 'love' with different frequencies
scenarios.expectedResult: first result docId=2 has score > second result docId=1

scenarios.description: search(term) skips entries when movie record is null (branch-true at B0 and branch-false at B3)
scenarios.path: B0竊達2竊達7竊達3竊達4竊達7竊達6
scenarios.precondition: BM25InvertedIndex with stubbed index term->docId but movies.remove(docId) to simulate missing movie
scenarios.expectedResult: return empty List<SearchResult> after skipping null movie

scenarios.description: search(term) yields negative IDF when term appears in all documents (boundary at computeIDF)
scenarios.path: B0竊達2竊達7竊達3竊達5竊達7竊達3竊達5竊達7竊達6
scenarios.precondition: BM25InvertedIndex with two movies both containing term 'all'
scenarios.expectedResult: return two results with negative relevanceScore values, ordered by frequency
